name: Nikolas Fletton
intro: I am a graduate IT professional with a Bachelor of Information Technology from QUT. I have a strong customer-facing background combined with technical problem-solving skills developed through hospitality, field-based work and hands-on projects. Known for calmly supporting users, translating complicated technical concepts into plain language, and working independently in fast-paced and high-responsibility environments.
introHtml: A brief, compelling introduction about who you are and what you do. Mention your core philosophy, your passion for building digital products, and your drive for creating efficient, high-impact solutions.
